_purpose: Source-of-truth pin for the upstream files this investigation modifies. Read by scripts/sync_investigation_patches.py.
_underscore_keys: All keys starting with underscore are ignored by the loader. Use them for inline documentation.
_sync_target_env_doc: Name of the env var (in .env) that holds the absolute path to the live install dir. Script errors cleanly if unset.
_files_doc: Filenames under patches/ to copy into the target dir. Each gets a per-day backup (<filename>.bak.<YYYYMMDD>) before overwrite.
